description: Overall, my experience with Klearcom has been very positive. The platform has significantly improved our ability to manage and test our phone lines and IVR systems. The automation and validation features have ensured that we maintain high-quality service for our end customers. Klearcom has also been a valuable partner in documenting our current systems, which has been essential for our transition to new technologies. The ongoing benefits and improvements in efficiency and reliability have made Klearcom an excellent choice for our needs.
author: Margot T.
pros: What I liked most about Klearcom is its powerful automation capabilities. The ability to test phone lines regularly and automatically has been a game-changer for us. Klearcom's tools have also been instrumental in catching issues with our system during off hours, which helps us avoid any impact on business operations. Additionally, the auto discovery feature has saved us a significant amount of time by accurately documenting our "as is" state, which is crucial for our transition to a new system.
cons: There isn't anything I liked the least about Klearcom. The team has been incredibly responsive and supportive throughout our implementation process. Whenever we encountered any issues or had questions, they were quick to provide assistance and solutions, ensuring that our transition was as smooth as possible. Their dedication to customer service has been outstanding and has made a significant positive impact on our experience.

description: Overall, Klearcom was a wise choice for Boehringer. I look forward to a long working partnership with the team and growing in functionality. The ease of interaction is priceless!
author: Anthony G.
pros: Klearcom's team was very easy to work with and very accommodating. [sensitive content hidden] and team went above and beyond to assist Boerhinger in getting onboarded and understanding the process and best uses.
cons: Klearcom's reporting is less than we'd like but they have made adjustments and accommodations for us while working the applications to meet our expectations and needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Klearcom provides a strong automated solution for the manual task of test calls
author: Jeremy S.
pros: Klearcom automated a manual task of tests calls while also being able to provide additional metrics & insights to caller experience
cons: Dashboards aren't intuitive unless you're a expert on the system

review_title: Remote Testing with a Global Reach
description: Very positive. The klearcom product has allowed my team and the NOC to significantly shorten the debug and problem isolation timeframe by not being reliant on the customer to make or confirm test calls. It has also significantly shortened the IVR development and verification timeframes.
author: Jack A.
pros: Easy to use product and a team that is very willing to listen to and incorporate suggestions/enhancements to the product. Has capabilities useful to NOC, provisioning, and engineering teams.
cons: A little difficult to navigate initially due to all the acronyms. But I quickly adapted
author_profession: Sr. Mgr. UCaaS Operations and Provisioning

description: only positive so far, from onboarding towards the current operational day to day support
author: Dries D.
pros: Personal follow-up , during the onboarding but also afterwards when the product is fully live. Open discussion and clear communication
cons: coverage, as we would like to have all countries available ;) but this is work in progress, Klearcom expanding their reach

review_title: Exceptional Experience with Klearcom: User-Friendly App and Outstanding Support
description: I have had a great experience with the Klearcom app and the Klearcom staff. The app's real-time monitoring and notification features have been invaluable in ensuring seamless operations, while the team's support and expertise have made every interaction smooth and efficient. Their commitment to excellence has greatly enhanced our service quality and operational efficiency.
author: Matthew S.
pros: What I liked most about Klearcom was the app's ease of use and intuitive design, which made navigating and utilizing its features seamless. Additionally, the support from their staff has been exceptional, always providing timely and helpful assistance. This combination has made my overall experience with Klearcom highly positive.
cons: I have no dislikes to report about Klearcom; my experience with both the app and the team has been entirely positive.

review_title: Working great and Made us more proactive
description: So far very good. Easy provisioning, testing tool and Alert management works well.
author: Balu Nivrutti I.
pros: Easy provisioning, testing tool and Alert management
cons: Information in the alert, it will more descriptive will be helpful.

description: The team has been very attentive and have spent a great deal of time ensuring I understand how to make the most out of the platform.
author: Manuel G.
pros: Softphone feature, being able to call from nearly every country is priceless.
cons: One China carrier no longer allows live testing, a minor inconvenience and it works for other carriers.

description: through several acquisitions, we monitor connectivity on legacy service providers. then after we port #s to our service provider.
author: Michael B.
pros: the monitoring of our environment. ensures uptime. reports failed connectivity
cons: none that i can think of..

description: Great custumer service... willing to add their advise
author: Shawn W.
pros: There flexiblity in monitoring only what you need.
cons: The only thing I regret is not having more voice applications for them to monitor

description: My overall experience with Klearcom has been highly positive. It has reliably supported our communication needs, offering robust features that are easy to use and integrate into our daily operations.
author: Rogelio P.
pros: The best aspect of using Klearcom has been its user-friendly interface, which made navigating through the features a seamless experience. The clarity in voice and video calls significantly enhanced our team's communication efficiency, making every interaction smooth and productive.
cons: Nothing so far, everything works as expected.
